nasb.text: It is a continual burnt offering which was ordained in Mount Sinai as a soothing aroma, an offering by fire to the Lord.

esv.text: It is a regular burnt offering, which was ordained at Mount Sinai for a pleasing aroma, a food offering to the Lord.

cnv.text: 這就是常獻的燔祭，是在西奈山規定，作為獻給耶和華馨香的火祭。

ccb.text: 这是在西奈山上规定的日常燔祭，是献给耶和华的馨香火祭。
